title: Filesystem locations
description: Bootstrap config for where the database, papers, figures, citations, and digests live. Read before any other config because the database itself can't house this. Stored in `data/user_config/paths.toml` (TOML, single-quoted strings preserve backslashes verbatim).

db_path.description: Absolute path to the SQLite database file. Defaults to `data/arxiv_scooper.db` under the repo root.

papers_dir.description: Directory containing PDF papers, named `<arXivId>_<Author>_<ShortTitle>.pdf`. On Windows commonly a directory junction into OneDrive.

figures_dir.description: Directory of extracted figure JPEGs, one subdirectory per arXiv ID.

inbox_dir.description: Staging area where the arXiv-fetch script drops `<id>_meta.json` files for the processor to pick up.

exports_dir.description: Output directory for collection .bib / .db / .json exports. Usually local — output, not data store.

digests_dir.description: Directory where daily arXiv digest HTML files (`digest_YYYY-MM-DD.html`) are written by `tools/arxiv_digest.py`.

references_bib_path.description: BibTeX citations file appended by `process_paper.py` when adding a paper.

references_txt_path.description: Plain-text (Physical Review style) citations file, appended in lockstep with references.bib.
